球队整体.title: Will Thibaut Courtois play against Atlético? Real Madrid goalkeeper injury update - AS USA
球队整体.content:
Real Madrid's medical team agreed that Courtois would rest today and undergo tests on Thursday to determine the extent of the possible injury.
Courtois was substituted at halftime of Real Madrid’s Champions League victory at Manchester City on Wednesday. ... The uncertainty over Thibaut Courtois’ availability to face Atlético Madrid will continue at least until tomorrow.
After beating City 2-1 at the Etihad Stadium - to seal a 5-1 aggregate win in the Champions League last 16 - Madrid now take on Atlético on Sunday, Mar. 22, on matchday 29 of the LaLiga season.
Courtois was forced off at halftime of yesterday’s Champions League win at Manchester City, prompting Andriy Lunin’s entrance for the second half. The Ukrainian delivered a strong performance, preventing Pep Guardiola’s side from gaining a foothold in the tie. Courtois had felt discomfort in his right adductor, and Madrid opted to take no risks with him to prevent the issue from worsening.
Speaking in this postgame press conference in Manchester, Madrid boss Álvaro Arbeloa sought to play down fears over Courtois’ injury. “He felt some discomfort,” Arbeloa told reporters. “He wanted to continue, but it wasn’t necessary.

球队整体.title: Atletico Madrid vs. Real Madrid—Spanish Super Cup: Preview, Predictions and Lineups
球队整体.content:
Atlético Madrid predicted lineup vs. Real Madrid (4-4-2): Oblak; Llorente, Giménez, Pubill, Hancko; Simeone, Gallagher, Koke, Baena; Sørloth, Alvarez.
Atlético Madrid predicted lineup vs. Real Madrid (4-4-2): Oblak; Llorente, Giménez, Pubill, Hancko; Simeone, Gallagher, Koke, Baena; Sørloth, Alvarez.
Real Madrid predicted lineup vs. Atlético Madrid (4-4-2): Courtois; Valverde, Rüdiger, Huijsen, Carreras; Rodrygo, Camavinga, Tchouaméni, Bellingham; G.
Diego Simeone led his side to a dominant 5–2 victory over Real Madrid back in September, leaving the 15-time European champions battered and humiliated at the Metropolitano. Los Blancos will no doubt have redemption on the mind come Thursday’s match, especially with pressure mounting on both Xabi Alonso and his men. A failure in the Spanish Super Cup could cost the Spaniard his place on the touchline, and his team even more embarrassment given their recent struggles. Atlético Madrid, meanwhile, would love nothing more than to make it two victories in a row against their bitter rivals to punch their ticket to the Spanish Super Cup final.
Despite the lopsided nature of September’s Madrid derby, clashes between Atlético Madrid and Real Madrid are more often than not low-scoring affairs decided by one stunning moment for either side. Harsh tackles and disciplined defenses typically take center stage in place of goalscoring thrillers. Alonso’s men have the slight edge in Thursday’s contest, though, even without Mbappé. The 15-time European champions sent five goals past Real Betis at the weekend while Los Colchoneros only managed a 1–1 draw with 15th place Real Sociedad.

教练.title: Who Will Be Real Madrid’s New Head Coach After Xabi Alonso’s Exit? | beIN SPORTS
教练.content:
The announcement was made official through a club statement, which confirmed that Arbeloa, previously in charge of Real Madrid Castilla, would take over immediately. The decision underscores the club’s confidence in a coach who has been developed entirely within the Madrid system.
Real Madrid wasted no time after the departure of Xabi Alonso. Just one day after falling to Barcelona in the Spanish Super Cup final, the club confirmed Álvaro Arbeloa as the new head coach of the first team, placing their trust in a familiar figure to guide the squad through the remainder of the season.
The announcement was made official through a club statement, which confirmed that Arbeloa, previously in charge of Real Madrid Castilla, would take over immediately. The decision underscores the club’s confidence in a coach who has been developed entirely within the Madrid system.
As head coach of the U-19s, Arbeloa delivered a historic treble in the 2022–23 season, winning the league, the youth Copa del Rey, and the Copa de Campeones, followed by another league title in the 2024–25 campaign. In June 2025, he was promoted to Real Madrid Castilla, whom he currently has sitting fourth in Group 1 of the Primera RFEF.
Álvaro Arbeloa’s coaching career has been built exclusively inside Real Madrid. He began his journey on the sidelines during the 2020–21 season with the U-13 squad, leading the team to a league title.

教练.title: Official Announcement: Álvaro Arbeloa
教练.content:
Real Madrid C. F. would like to announce that Álvaro Arbeloa will be the new first team coach. Álvaro Arbeloa has been the coach of Castilla since June 2025, and has spent his entire coaching career in Real Madrid's youth academy since 2020.
OFFICIAL ANNOUNCEMENT.12/01/2026 · Real Madrid C. F. would like to announce that Álvaro Arbeloa will be the new first team coach. Álvaro Arbeloa has been the coach of Castilla since June 2025, and has spent his entire coaching career in Real Madrid's youth academy since 2020.
Real Madrid C. F. would like to announce that Álvaro Arbeloa will be the new first team coach. Álvaro Arbeloa has been the coach of Castilla since June 2025, and has spent his entire coaching career in Real Madrid's youth academy since 2020. He coached the Under-14s A in the 2020-2021 season, winning the league title, the Under-16s in the 2021-2022 season and the Under-19s from 2022 to 2025.
As coach of the Under-19s, he won the treble in the 2022-2023 season (League, Copa del Rey and Champions Cup) and the League in the 2024-2025 season. As a player, Álvaro Arbeloa was part of Real Madrid in one of the most successful periods of its history. He defended our shirt between 2009 and 2016, in 238 official matches.

教练.title: A masterclass from Arbeloa? The Real Madrid coach knocked out Guardiola and Mourinho in the same Champions League | Marca
教练.content:
After this victory, Arbeloa has managed to eliminate two of the most successful coaches in history, Mourinho and Pep Guardiola, an achievement worthy of note for a rookie coach. When asked about this feat in a press conference, the Real Madrid coach directed the praise towards his players with elegance and a touch of humor, a nod that keeps Real Madrid fans delighted: "I have some players who are amazing" replied Arbeloa.
Real Madrid coach continues to surprise in his debut season with Los Blancos · RYAN MITCHELL · 18/03/2026 - 05:55 CDT · Compartir en Facebook · Compartir en Twitter · Compartir en Telegram · Compartir en Whatsapp · Enviar por email · Real Madrid. Vinicius seals the deal against City ·
Real Madrid have had a very difficult year. At the beginning of the season it was thought that the team would fly high under the leadership of Xabi Alonso, who had just achieved historic success with Bayer Leverkusen in the Bundesliga. However, after a series of poor results and amid rumours of a broken dressing room, he was dismissed to make way for Alvaro Arbeloa · With the odds against him and no experience of coaching in the top flight, Arbeloa took on the challenge, brought Vini back into the spotlight, adjusted a couple of pieces and the Merengues are still inconsistent, capable of thrashing the most successful team of the last decade in the Premier League, or suffering elimination at the hands of a second division team, but each time showing better football and above all, harmony in the team.
After this victory, Arbeloa has managed to eliminate two of the most successful coaches in history, Mourinho and Pep Guardiola, an achievement worthy of note for a rookie coach. When asked about this feat in a press conference, the Real Madrid coach directed the praise towards his players with elegance and a touch of humor, a nod that keeps Real Madrid fans delighted: "I have some players who are amazing" replied Arbeloa.

教练.title: USMNT’s Mauricio Pochettino expected to attend Atletico Madrid vs Tottenham - The Athletic
教练.content:
March 9, 2026 · Share full article · 24 · Mauricio Pochettino is expected to attend Tuesday night’s Champions League first-leg tie between Atletico Madrid and Tottenham Hotspur.
March 9, 2026 · Share full article · 24 · Mauricio Pochettino is expected to attend Tuesday night’s Champions League first-leg tie between Atletico Madrid and Tottenham Hotspur. The 54-year-old USMNT head coach will be an official guest of Atletico, and may have a watching brief over midfielder Johnny Cardoso, who is pushing to be included in Pochettino’s squad for this summer’s World Cup.
Cardoso has started in just 12 matches for Atletico this term and has featured in five of the club’s 10 Champions League games. Pochettino and Spurs suffered heartbreak at the Madrid stadium in June 2019 when they were beaten 2-0 by Liverpool in the Champions League final. Five months later, the Argentine coach was sacked, bringing down the curtain on his five-and-a-half year spell in charge.
Spurs will be looking to appoint a permanent head coach after placing Igor Tudor in charge until the end of the season, following the sacking of Thomas Frank last month.

Real Madrid are sitting pretty, 3-0 up against Manchester City heading into the second leg of their Champions League clash. Alvaro Arbeloa's side marched to a 3-0 win in last week's first leg, thanks to a sensational first-half hat-trick from skipper Federico Valverde. Arbeloa's fairly taxing injury situation is also starting to ease, with Kylian Mbappe, Jude Bellingham and Alvaro Carreras all part of the travelling party after time on the sidelines.
Mendy started the win over Manchester City but was later diagnosed with an injury in the biceps femoris of his right leg. This weekend's derby against Atletico Madrid might be his most realistic target. ... Rodrygo has suffered a rupture of his anterior cruciate ligament and a rupture of the lateral meniscus in his right leg. This significant setback means the Brazil forward will miss the 2026 World Cup and he is likely to be sidelined for at least six months, possibly longer.
MORE: Why Xabi Alonso and Real Madrid gave up after just seven months together · Below is the latest injury picture for Real Madrid, including estimated return dates for those who are sidelined.
Midfielder Ceballos is estimated to be facing two months out with a calf injury sustained in the loss to Osasuna at El Sadar on February 21. Madrid's league game with Alaves on April 22 would seem a realistic return date unless Ceballos' recovery progresses more quickly.

球员.title: Camavinga Returns Just in Time as Injury-Hit Real Madrid Prepare for Celta Clash | Managing Madrid
球员.content:
The result is a severely depleted squad heading into a difficult away match in Vigo. But the late returns of Camavinga and Asencio, modest as they may seem, offer Real Madrid a bit of relief at a time when the squad depth had reached a critical ...
MADRID, SPAIN - FEBRUARY 28: Eduardo Camavinga at Ciudad Real Madrid on February 28, 2026 in Madrid, Spain.
Raúl Asencio will also be part of the traveling squad, another crucial development given the mounting injury crisis. Asencio had been recovering from a cervical strain suffered after an awkward fall against Benfica, but he too trained with the group and appears ready to return. Even with those returns, Real Madrid will travel with just 15 first-team players available.
In addition to the injuries, several players are unavailable due to suspensions.
The result is a severely depleted squad heading into a difficult away match in Vigo. But the late returns of Camavinga and Asencio, modest as they may seem, offer Real Madrid a bit of relief at a time when the squad depth had reached a critical point.

by Lucas NavarreteMar 18, 2026, 3:59 PM UTC · Real Madrid goalkeeper Thibaut Courtois was forced to leave the team’s match against Manchester City in the return leg of the Champions League’s Round of 16 with a minor groin injury he picked up during his warm-up routine at the Etihad Stadium. As of right now, Courtois is considerded ‘doubtful’ for Sunday’s Madrid Derby against Atlético de Madrid.
Either way, it looks like Courtois’ injury isn’t serious, so he should be fresh and ready to face Bayern Munich in the Champions League Quarterfinals, which will kick off on April 7th. ... 球员.title: How will Atlético Madrid line up against Getafe in LALIGA? | Into the Calderon
球员.content:
Just two days after making his return to the team against Tottenham, Pablo Barrios left Thursday’s training session early after he felt pain in his right leg. It came to light that he had suffered from an injury deemed worthy of an official ...
Juan Musso goalkeeper of Atletico de Madrid and Argentina during the second leg of the Copa del Rey semi-final between FC Barcelona and Atletico de Madrid at Spotify Camp Nou on March 3, 2026 in Barcelona, Spain.
Atlético Madrid flip back into LALIGA mode on Saturday afternoon when they host local rivals Getafe CF at the Estadio Metropolitano. Sandwiched in between the two legs of their UEFA Champions League last 16 tie with Tottenham Hotspur, this league match against one of Spain’s most notoriously difficult sides comes at an important moment in Los Rojiblancos’ season. Facing Getafe will be Atleti’s 20th match of what has been a hectic 2026, and Diego Simeone faces a tough decision as to how he selects his team for this one, bearing in mind what the imminent future holds.
Just two days after making his return to the team against Tottenham, Pablo Barrios left Thursday’s training session early after he felt pain in his right leg. It came to light that he had suffered from an injury deemed worthy of an official post by the club on social media, which only happens when said injury is significant enough to keep a player out of action.
Atleti head north in LALIGA return.
